description: Synthetic metadata assignments for metadata-aware designer training evals.

tags.description: Props that can carry personality or narrative focus.

tags.description: Props intended to reinforce rather than lead.

tags.description: Props suitable for pulse or groove-driven motion.

tags.description: Props that can act as a primary attention anchor.

tags.description: Props suited to short hits, reveals, and punctuation.

tags.name: wash
tags.description: Props suited to broad color-field support.

tags.name: perimeter
tags.description: Props that frame the scene or edges.

tags.name: centerpiece
tags.description: Props near the visual center or strongest compositional emphasis.

tags.description: Props best used as depth or support rather than lead.

tags.description: Props whose geometry supports vertical motion or rise/fall reads.
